ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the article */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Publication date of the article */,
  "article_type" TEXT /* Type of article (e.g., journal article, conference paper, book chapter) */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal if applicable */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference if applicable */,
  "book_title" TEXT /* Title of the book if applicable */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume number of the journal or book */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Issue number of the journal */,
  "page_range" TEXT /* Page range of the article */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the article has been downloaded */,
  "views_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the article has been viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Author's affiliation (institution, department) */,
  "orcid_id" TEXT /* Author's ORCID identifier */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_authors" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "author_order" INTEGER /* Order of the author in the list of authors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "keyword_name" TEXT /* Name of the keyword */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the keyword across all articles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_keywords" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* ID of the keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being cited */,
  "citing_article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article that cited it */,
  "citation_date" TEXT /* Date of the citation */,
  "context" TEXT /* Context or snippet where the citation appears */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_citing_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("citing_article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, researcher, student) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended article */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date of the recommendation */,
  "score" REAL /* Score or confidence level of the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_recommendations_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the viewed article */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date of the view */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the view in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_views_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Type of article (e.g., journal article, conference paper, book chapter)
Name of the journal if applicable
Name of the conference if applicable
Title of the book if applicable
Volume number of the journal or book
Number of times the article has been downloaded
Number of times the article has been viewed
Order of the author in the list of authors
Frequency of the keyword across all articles
ID of the article being cited
ID of the article that cited it
Context or snippet where the citation appears
Role of the user (e.g., administrator, researcher, student)
Date when the user account was created
Score or confidence level of the recommendation
Duration of the view in seconds
ID of the user who made the comment
